author: lOrm
content: Delivered: Removed provider_name and model parameters from forward_request() signature. Removed hardcoded 'google' branch. URL now composed uniformly as base_url+endpoint for all providers. GoogleAdapter::chat_endpoint() already returns '/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent' so the produced URL is identical. All three call sites updated. OCP satisfied: new providers override chat_endpoint only. 1135 tests pass, clippy clean, rustfmt exit 0.
